s2.ptxt: Install the underdrive clutch to the transaxle case.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the oil seal rings.

s2.ptxt: Install a dial indicator as shown in the illustration.
Measure the underdrive clutch pack clearance while applying and releasing compressed air (392 kPa, 4.0 kgf/cm2, 57 psi).
If the pack clearance is not within the specified range, inspect the discs, plates, and flange.
Check if the sliding surfaces of the discs, plates and flange are worn or burnt. If necessary, replace them.

item.ptxt: If the lining of a disc comes off or discolors, or even if a part of the groove is damaged, replace all discs.
Before assembling new discs, soak them in ATF for at least 15 minutes.

s2.ptxt: Using a dial indicator, measure the inside diameter of the underdrive clutch drum bushing.
If the inside diameter is greater than the maximum, replace the underdrive clutch drum.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT UNDERDRIVE CLUTCH RETURN SPRING SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using vernier calipers, measure the free length of the spring together with the spring seat.
If the free length is shorter than the standard free length, replace the underdrive clutch return spring sub-assembly.
